scripts.build: esbuild src/main.jsx --bundle --minify --format=iife --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/dashboard.app.js && cat node_modules/dockview/dist/styles/dockview.css node_modules/@xyflow/react/dist/style.css src/styles/base.css src/styles/layout.css src/styles/components.css src/styles/features/graph.css src/styles/features/holding.css src/styles/responsive.css > dist/dashboard.css
